blocks.text: In a popular action game, there are n different critical strike equipments available in the shop. The i-th pi equipment has a probability of 100 to trigger a critical strike with multiplier vi , and costs wi coins. Each equipment can be bought only once. When multiple equipments trigger critical strikes simultaneously, only the highest multiplier takes effect. If no equipment triggers a critical strike, the effective multiplier is regarded as 0. You can spend at most m coins to buy some equipments. You need to maximize the expected effective multiplier of the equipments you bought.

There are multiple test cases. The first line of the input contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ 300), indicating the number of test cases. For each test case: The first line contains two integers n and m (1 ≤ n, m ≤ 3 × 10³ ), indicating the number of equipments and the maximum number of coins you can spend. For the following n lines, the i-th line contains three integers pi , vi , and wi (1 ≤ pi ≤ 100, 1 ≤ vi ≤ 10⁹ , 1 ≤ wi ≤ 3 × 10³ ), indicating the i-th equipment. It is guaranteed that the sum of n and the sum of m over all test cases do not exceed 3 × 10³ .

For each test case, output one line containing a single real number, indicating the maximum expected effective multiplier. Your answer will be considered correct if its absolute or relative error does not exceed 10−6 . Formally speaking, suppose that your answer is a and the jury’s answer is b, your answer is accepted if and only if |a−b| −6 max(1,|b|) ≤ 10 .
在一款热门动作游戏中，商店里有 n 种不同的暴击装备可供选择。第 i 件装备有 pi 的概率触发暴击，100暴击倍率为 vᵢ，并需要花费 wᵢ 枚金币购买。每件装备只能购买一次。当多件装备同时触发暴击时，只有最高的暴击倍率有效。如果没有装备触发暴击，则有效倍率视为 0。您最多可以花费 m 枚金币购买装备。您需要最大化所购买装备的期望有效倍率。

有多组测试数据。第一行输入一个整数 T（1 ≤ T ≤ 300），表示测试数据组数。对于每组测试数据：第一行输入两个整数 n 和 m（1 ≤ n,m ≤ 3 × 10³），表示装备的数量和您可以花费的最大金币数。对于接下来的 n 行，第 i 行输入三个整数 pᵢ，vᵢ 和 wᵢ（1 ≤ pᵢ ≤ 100，1 ≤ vᵢ ≤ 10⁹，1 ≤ wᵢ ≤ 3 × 10³），表示第 i 件装备。保证所有测试数据中 n 的总和以及 m 的总和均不超过 3 × 10³。
每组测试数据输出一行，包含一个实数，表示最大的期望有效倍率。如果您的答案的绝对误差或相对误差不超过 10−6，则将被视为正确。更正式地，假设您的输出为 a，标准答案为 b，当且仅当 |a−b| ≤ 10−6 时，您的输出才会被接受。max(1,|b|)
